reviews.review_title: Great game, betrayed by the developers
reviews.review_description:
This was my favorite Overwatch game in VR. I enjoyed it more than Overwatch.

I was under the impression this game had bots so if it didn’t survive we can play this game still.

But no offline bot support and they’re shutting the game down. So we bought this game for nothing .

They stole from us players. Please don’t buy from this developer again.

Game will no longer be available to play October 1st according to steam. Great game to play I hate to see it go. It’s the only game I play on vr that keeps me interested. I would love to see the game updated.

Ever since this game released, I love playing it. I recently came back to it, but now im wishing it would get some new updates. Maybe a new character, a new area? Or maybe simply import it to screen mode so people for both vr and screen mode can play together like how it is in Phasmophobia. 
Still one of the few games that keeps me with vr honestly though. Id like to give it a 4.5 stars, but 4 is fine. Id change it to a 5 if theres ever a new character or map or an import to screen mode that'll ever happen. 
Thank y'all for this game, truly!

reviews.review_title: Awesome game, need to know when to play
reviews.review_description: I've played for 5 years now and it's one of the few VR games I always come back to, the player base is pretty small though so it helps to know what time to get on to see more people. Joining the discord will let you know when people are on and people will say when they get on

reviews.review_title: is it a good game but it is dead
reviews.review_description: the game is dead but please ways to fix it make a new update with more characters add make it free to play to get more players

reviews.review_title: This game was perfect for standalone
reviews.review_description: This game was like Overwatch but in VR. And it worked perfectly. Unfortunately the devs disappeared, and the game is stagnant.  Nobody to play with. 5 stars if the devs and the players come back.

reviews.review_title: Great title, but isn't supported by devs
reviews.review_description: The game was really fun when it launched, but the game is kinda dead at this point. The last update was over a year ago at the time of writing, and it's been even longer since they dropped a new hero. They released ONE new hero and map, post launch, none were released after that, in full.  A few new maps were released, but they weren't complete. When I have gone back to it, I've had fun for a little while, but I end up playing with the same people the whole time because so few people are online at once. I really wish the devs had continued supporting this game long-term post launch, but that didn't happen, and it has sort of ruined what was a really fun game when it launched. For $30, at this point, it's not worth buying. I would love to see the devs drop a huge update and bring this game back, but I don't have high hopes.

reviews.review_title: This is game is so good
reviews.review_description: This game is fantastic, but the price tag is definitely the downfall of the player base. This game still plays very well and it has awesome heros and abilities. But as the player count decrease it's very hard to convince people to purchase a $30 game. If they drop the price tag to $10 or even make it free I truly feel that would save this AMAZING game!
Great game. Great variety of classes. Sadly, it seems that the player base is dying out. Played with a lot of bots recently. Maybe it might be a clever move to go free to play to revive it.
This game is amazing basically overwatch for vr but for as good as I think it is it feels like it’s already dying the developers rarely update the game

This game is awesome and I'm curious as to why others aren't playing it. This is easily one of my Top 10 favorite VR games since VR started out in 2016 with the Oculus, Vive & PSVR. So much fun to play...the only drawback is it's mostly computer bots but an occasional human. Even then I highly recommend this game.

I havent figured it out yet... lol I suck at vr games... like fr... I can't beat the tutorial to even get into the game. I wish I would've got a refund. Oh well. Maybe my nieces and nephews will eventually play it.

Honestly I really really enjoy this game and I feel there’s a lot to do, especially with all the characters, although my only downsides with it is people have gotten so good at it it’s sometimes really hard to play multiplayer without getting angry from dying so many times, but aside from that coop is pretty fun especially with friends but the AI might need a small tweak but it’s still fun I’m really excited to see the future updates and hope we get some soon with maybe new characters too, also the beta maps are pretty good too, my personal favorite is the Urban City lol but I think this game is worth the money and I would recommend it.

reviews.review_title: I came into this a bit skeptical.
reviews.review_description:
But after a couple hours of playing I start to realize the game is awesome. I have very little to complain about but this is it.
- I couldn’t find to turn on immersion so I don’t see my controllers suddenly pop in and out my hands. 
-ADS is not as bad as everyone says but it’s a little slow, it’s manageable.
- I hope there’s a competitive mode.
So my gripes are not that bad and the game is hella fun. Definitely worth a try if you’re into team based shooter.Maybe most you tubers are getting endorsed by pop1 or something because I don’t get why their bad reviews. This game is great if you’re into team based shooters.

When first getting this game, it's easy to see that a lot of people seem way too good. And some are. However, after a little practice and picking the hero that flows best with how you want to play, you'll become super good too. 

That being said, the time it takes to start to get better and enjoy the game more and the time it takes for the game to get stale match up right at that point. I like the game but I stopped playing almost as soon as I started to get pretty consistently high kill counts. 

Biggest problems with this game is variety. Not enough maps. The character count is actually okay, and the maps are all generally the same size, but there's not enough of them and not enough variations. The mechanics are pretty solid, the gameplay is great, the game suffers at the moment because of limited content. I'm sure it will be fixed with future updates because it's so new but I don't find much desire to jump in it at the moment because I'm tired of looking at the same maps over and over.

I am in love with this game; the devs rapidly fixed the running issue, and I have lirerally been playing this game for 4 hours straight. The progress system is just perfect, and by far the most intense fps I have ever played. This game shows what true vr shooters should be like and need to become! 
See you all online....playazzzzz
Matches could be bit longer otherwise solid game
A super solid game style. And fun play. With updates coming. The game is just fun. And i feel a good balance between characters.
Game sucked!

At the first few games I found it really hard to play and understand the game.
But each game I learned more and more, so now I can experience how fun this gane is!

There are several heros with different abillities, skins,etc.. which is amazing! Love this game!

Is it worth getting this game? Definitely.
